docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $543.22 FILED BY PATELCO CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT DAMALERIO DARLENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-20-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF JUN-16-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
THE DEFT IN THIS CASE WAS NOT SERVED. THE CLAIM OF PLTF WAS NEVER RECEIVED IN THE RETURN MAIL. I BE- LIEVE THESE PAPERS HAVE BEEN LOST IN THE MAIL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAMALERIO DARLENE $543.22 PRINCIPAL, $66.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $609.22 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
